languages.text: "Изимонд? Он верный слуга. Когда Ювенна представила его мне, я и подумать не мог, каким ценным подданным он станет. Оружие, о которым вы говорите, я лично даровал ему за заслуги перед династией".

traits.locale_text: "Изимонд? Он верный слуга. Когда Ювенна представила его мне, я и подумать не мог, каким ценным подданным он станет. Оружие, о которым вы говорите, я лично даровал ему за заслуги перед династией".

languages.text: "Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Изимонд? Он верный слуга. Когда Ювенна представила его мне, я и подумать не мог, каким ценным подданным он станет. Оружие, о которым вы говорите, я лично даровал ему за заслуги перед династией".

traits.locale_text: "Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."

"Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."

"Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."

languages.text: "Isimond? Er ist ein treuer Diener. Als ihn mir Juvenna vorstellte, hatte ich keine Ahnung, wie wertvoll er für mich werden würde. Die Waffe, von der Ihr sprecht, habe ich ihm selbst für seine treuen Dienste geschenkt."
languages.original_text: "Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Isimond? Er ist ein treuer Diener. Als ihn mir Juvenna vorstellte, hatte ich keine Ahnung, wie wertvoll er für mich werden würde. Die Waffe, von der Ihr sprecht, habe ich ihm selbst für seine treuen Dienste geschenkt."

languages.text: “伊西蒙德？他是个忠心的仆从。尤文娜把他引荐给我的时候，我完全没想到，他会成为如此宝贵的臣属。你说的那把武器，是我为了表彰他对王朝的贡献，亲手赐给他的。”
languages.original_text: "Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “伊西蒙德？他是个忠心的仆从。尤文娜把他引荐给我的时候，我完全没想到，他会成为如此宝贵的臣属。你说的那把武器，是我为了表彰他对王朝的贡献，亲手赐给他的。”

languages.text: « Isimond ? C'est un serviteur loyal. Quand Juvenna me l'a présenté, j'ignorais qu'il se révélerait si précieux. Je lui ai personnellement remis l'arme que vous évoquez, en récompense des loyaux services rendus à la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « Isimond ? C'est un serviteur loyal. Quand Juvenna me l'a présenté, j'ignorais qu'il se révélerait si précieux. Je lui ai personnellement remis l'arme que vous évoquez, en récompense des loyaux services rendus à la dynastie. »

languages.text: «¿Isimond? Es un sirviente leal. Cuando Juvenna me lo presentó, no tenía ni idea de lo valioso que sería como súbdito. El arma de la que habla fue un regalo personal que le hice en agradecimiento por su servicio a la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «¿Isimond? Es un sirviente leal. Cuando Juvenna me lo presentó, no tenía ni idea de lo valioso que sería como súbdito. El arma de la que habla fue un regalo personal que le hice en agradecimiento por su servicio a la dinastía».

languages.text: "İsimond... O sadık bir hizmetkârdır. Juvenna onu bana sunduğunda ne kadar değerli bir tebaa olacağı hakkında hiçbir fikrim yoktu. Bahsettiğin silah, hanedanlığa yaptığı hizmetlerden dolayı ona bizzat benim hediyemdir."
languages.original_text: "Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "İsimond... O sadık bir hizmetkârdır. Juvenna onu bana sunduğunda ne kadar değerli bir tebaa olacağı hakkında hiçbir fikrim yoktu. Bahsettiğin silah, hanedanlığa yaptığı hizmetlerden dolayı ona bizzat benim hediyemdir."

languages.text: 「イシモンド？彼は忠実な臣下だ。ジュベナが彼を私に紹介した時、彼がどれほど貴重な臣下になるか想像もできなかった。君が言っている武器は、私が彼に王朝への貢献を称えて贈ったものだ。」
languages.original_text: "Isimond? He is a loyal servant. When Juvenna presented him to me, I had no idea how valuable a subject he would become. The weapon you speak of, I personally gifted it to him for his services to the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「イシモンド？彼は忠実な臣下だ。ジュベナが彼を私に紹介した時、彼がどれほど貴重な臣下になるか想像もできなかった。君が言っている武器は、私が彼に王朝への貢献を称えて贈ったものだ。」
